rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports and features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Declare boolean range conditions using helper equations with named limits.
Ensure type consistency between AGREE expressions and AADL data types.
Avoid referencing AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions without proper scope mapping.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid component ports and features.
anti_patterns: Do not generate assumptions or guarantees that reference implementation-only subcomponents in type contracts.
Do not attempt to convert Boolean domain values into integers unless explicitly supported by the AADL model.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
